ty KaDe for teaching me to defang the snake

Today N'Chef Cup Tournament live stream start! <:24_Meow:1468259476107821137>
The translation is weird but it's decrease by 15~30% but the weirdest thing is sometimes it's just 10% decrease
It's nice uses, it consume all of your arithmetica
It might have some uses if you're lucky into alva + ramona + saya
So you X card into ramona exalt into copy X card
And in theory Alva would have like 234 hp
But like i said using all of your stamina for a niche use is rough
Not by much, the sin mark is still there, you're also losing a slot for stuffs like doll to cleanse revive
So it will probably go into saya + tinct forced combo in order to have a cleanse
Daff + ramona combo is just better against pollux because who can stack sin mark if dead already?
I'm guessing 4 or 5 turns otk it's quite slow tbh
Try the R wheel that gives 10 alienus per skills cast, you can basically have a small exalt spam
Can have potential but it's too niche
If you're still there then why not <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
Careful tho, your main dps seems to be ryker + aurita, losing ryker is like losing 40% of your dmg
Idk who you had acquired but for that team specifically, go nautila front
Maybe with my old alva team but it's fked up into no cleanse and praying for nobleman staff early
But you lack cleanse like i said
And it's forced coupling tinct while saya is arithmetica hungry to make her work
Nobleman staff is not that reliable because of stun
You can easily gets games drawing nobleman staff turn 4 or 5
Her cards look awful in value. 1 Arith for 5 healing lol.
Need to be low to heal
But idk if it's self heal or team heal
2 Arith for the worst damage card I've seen yet.
Maybe her problem is her kit rely too much on X card with almost 0 heal
I don't see the value in the 2 other cards
One can reduce card cost yes
But it's killing saya who have basically 0 heal capabilities
The only extremely good use of Saya that i could think of is draft pick
With relic that give you tea party card
The one that force kill someone
This + saya max hp should be quite insane
Her X card gets affected by amplifications
Saya's exalt effect doesn't stacks if she can exalt 2 times in a row during the same turn, it's only 1 stack
So you gain 50% less max hp if you're blighten
I see, so if I spend 20 turns stacking 10 amp, I can then spend 10 Arith to heal 120 hp.
It doesn't remove the HP loss from sin mark, let's say saya have 95 initial HP, in theory she can double it to 190 HP total
But if she got sin mark let's say 30
But it makes healing buff wheels working on it
If you X card while their HP already got x2 maxed by the buff the remaining HP from it will instead convert into healing
Will heal by the amount of X card used
Or if she was like 160 HP
She will gain 30 max HP and then convert 30 into healing
I need to test one last thing
But i can't do this test in the solo testing ground
I want to see if you can dispel the X card buff
It never says cannot be dispelled
So technically max hp can be dispelled?
What tean can I use saya in
<@1344504250784551014> this is the rundown of the tests i did

Use the posse that discard and shuffle back your hand
Only 1 amplify is not worth compared to beford
Memory syndrom can be replaced with GMurphy SR wheel
So you can stack 25% more sacrifice
Enhance + 5 charges + 7 cards = 60 AoE dmg from Exalt
And with arachne it's delayed too
So you can counter stuff like analysis of death wheels
That one made me lose once
And we didn't even count winkle vuln debuff
And also the damages you did with helot skills cards on highest hp

<@1424954154656464936> what did you wanted to say?
I have been testing out a couple teams with saya. She feels so uncomfortable to use. existing healers are better lmao.<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
I've just been spamming vortice for allpick weeks but what does vortice actually lose to, I've won almost every game
I limit tested all the interactions with her
does she lose to helot or like any other oneshotter who's faster than her? is the only thing I can think of
Also her X card can be dispelled so no more max HP after wasting 10 arithmetica
Meanwhile pollux can just remove your max HP PERMA while his cards cost 0
Helot team is just too fast
is there an overview anywhere of the different comps that are around?
<:thinking1:1356068128936820929> I guess I should actually play the game if I want to know what's around in the meta
I X card with 9 arithmetica on ghelot
Yup. Sticking with corposant and doll is the better option for most teams
Yup. I thought she was going to be someone who offset pollux's hp drain. I didn't realize her entire gimmick could be erased so easily
Imagine wasting your entire arithmetica pools
Only for the enemy to remove it the next turn with a 1 cost
And doll is a free character.  There really is no need to run her.
Doesn't replace anyone. Isnt a side grade to anyone. Rip. I was looking forward to her performance
She can't heal other allies unless she spend the entire arithmetica you have into X cards in the span of 2 turns
Her 2 cost heal sucks for self heal
Her 0 cost lost her too much HP for being a non healer
An actual brick of a character
So you RNG a debuff that looks like "15~30%" reduction on to find out in practice it's 10%
She doesn't have any cleanse or dispel
Her only buff can be dispelled
Is there someone that scales with max hp<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
it's more comical the more i think about it. The least she could do is provide an enhance since this is the age of  4 turns
Ive seen a pretty ramped up salvador played with saya but i dont really know what he does
I think Lily with her heals, but damage wise no
so, she has no spot in the big or middle leagues
Put her on the bench and run the chad that is doll
Her X card max hp given is affected by blighten
Imagine spending 10 arithmetica to try and get 60 max HP
Only to get 30 because you're blighten
And you can't dispel it because the slot to place doll got removed for Saya
If you want to dispel you're like obligated to Saya + tinct / cassiah
You might not even get it throughout the whole round
Lily is based on missing health, the same for ghelot but it's rough
Since the X card from saya is a card that function like a healing card
It can get increased by wheels or amplifications
A unit who's strength is seemingly in stacking
She will probably get a balancing adjustment for traphase
Because current state of Saya is just being a walking clown

Saya’s Gynoecium is affected by double (from arachne card or wod)
I think they should make her max hp increase permanent in my biased opinion
I mean... It's their fault to not bring dispel

Sorry, keeping my eye on two things at once-
Where was that barrier from again
You kill ghelot = it barrier every remaining allies alive
So i needed to arach ult my helot
Ill keep note of that, what's the general counter playstyle to alva though
Ive won once by letting a lone corpita fight them
And then you spam helot skill cards
Alva reinforce + shield makes you need to dmg her for like 400 dmg
Meanwhile if it's just normal alva
So just gotta never let her be the last
You can 200+ dmg and she is 100% dead next turn
That's why you stash 1 cost 10 shield
You saw there were round i couldn't play any cards
I just was paying bad attention, sorry for that
And wasted like 3 or 4 arithmetica per round
I also have another cancerous team but idk if it still works after nerfs and such
Yaa just give me a few minutes or ill be playing with my toes again
So much stagnation paired with huge dmg
Because you don't have enough arithmetica and weave stacks to kill me
So you're forced into a losing exalt
And i had enough illusion cards to charge aigis for exalt stun
I need to manage to win at least a single round
I wasnt expecting the helot burst down
Knowing unit kits is indeed important here
Before there was another team comp with hameln, i can try to replicate it but idk how it will do this time
